prompts.title: CogVideoX 东京时尚漫步
prompts.prompt: A stylish woman walks down a Tokyo street filled with warm glowing neon and animated city signage. She wears a black leather jacket, a long red dress, and black boots, and carries a black purse. She wears sunglasses and red lipstick. She walks confidently and casually. The street is damp and reflective, creating a mirror effect of the colorful lights, and many pedestrians walk about.
prompts.notes: CogVideoX 官方样板 prompt,英文最多 226 token,详细场景描述

prompts.title: CogVideoX 海岸日落浪潮
prompts.prompt: Ocean waves crashing against a rocky coastline at sunset. Spray and mist catching the golden light. Camera positioned low, watching waves approach and recede. Natural sound implied, peaceful yet powerful atmosphere. The horizon glows with deep orange and pink hues, seabirds occasionally drift across the frame, and the rhythm of the waves dominates the composition.

prompts.title: CogVideoX 弹吉他熊猫
prompts.prompt: A panda, dressed in a small, red jacket and a tiny hat, sits on a wooden stool in a serene bamboo forest. The panda's fluffy paws strum a miniature acoustic guitar, producing soft, melodic tunes. Nearby, a few other pandas gather, watching curiously and some clapping in rhythm. Sunlight filters through the tall bamboo, casting a gentle glow on the scene. The panda's face is expressive, showing concentration and joy as it plays.

prompts.title: CogVideoX I2V 风景动态化
prompts.prompt: Based on the provided still image of a tranquil landscape, gentle motion brings the scene to life over the course of six seconds. Water in the foreground ripples softly as a light breeze passes across its surface, concentric circles spreading outward from a single point. Leaves on the trees lining the shore sway with the wind, their fresh green coloring catching shifts of dappled sunlight. Distant clouds drift slowly across a brilliantly clear sky, their shadows moving subtly across the rolling hills behind. The camera holds a steady wide composition, capturing the serene movement of nature without any cuts. Soft, diffused daylight bathes the entire scene in warm golden tones, creating a picturesque, contemplative atmosphere.

prompts.title: CogVideoX 本地部署测试 prompt
prompts.prompt: A cat with bright green eyes sits on a wooden windowsill, watching raindrops trace winding patterns down the cold glass. The cat's striped grey fur is illuminated by the warm interior light, while outside, blurred lights of a city evening glow softly in the rain-soaked street. The cat's tail twitches occasionally, ears rotating slightly toward the sound of distant traffic. Each raindrop catches a tiny reflection of the city lights as it slides down the pane. The camera holds a static medium close-up framing the cat in profile against the window, capturing the contrast between the cozy indoor warmth and the cool blue tones of the rainy night outside.

prompts.title: CogVideoX 上海雨夜小巷
prompts.prompt: A narrow alley in old Shanghai at night, drizzle falling steadily, neon signs in Chinese characters reflected on wet cobblestones. An elderly tea vendor stands beside his small wooden cart under a single hanging bulb, pouring tea into a small ceramic cup. Steam rises from the cup. The camera slowly pushes in from behind a parked bicycle, framing the vendor and his cart in soft warm light against the cool blue night.

prompts.title: CogVideoX 手表精致展示
prompts.prompt: A close-up of a luxury mechanical watch rests on a polished walnut surface, the rich grain of the wood catching warm directional light. The second hand sweeps smoothly across the white enamel dial, each tick rendered in fine detail. The camera slowly orbits around the watch, revealing the brushed-steel case from multiple angles. Through the transparent caseback in alternating shots, the intricate movement of internal gears, jewels, and the balance wheel becomes visible, each component working in delicate synchronization. Single key light from the upper right creates crisp specular highlights along the polished bezel and crown, while soft shadows fall behind the watch on the wood. The atmosphere is serene and contemplative, highlighting the artistry of the timepiece.

prompts.title: CogVideoX 流光抽象艺术
prompts.prompt: An abstract composition of flowing colored liquids merging and separating against a pure black background, deep indigo and electric coral colors swirling in intricate fractal patterns, slow rotating motion creating mesmerizing visual rhythm, hyperreal liquid surface tension with metallic sheen catching directional light, satisfying loop.

prompts.title: 26 字母物品节拍剪辑(Google AI 官方样板)
prompts.prompt: The video shows items of the alphabet. An unusual item starting with each letter is shown sitting on a table (like a Capybara for C, disco globe for D and Lava Lamp for L). All 26 letters must be represented by 26 items with matching lower thirds displaying the letter. Only one item and lower third at a time. Each lower third must look like a black marker written on a slip of paper in the bottom left. Rapid fire, roughly 9 frames per item at 24FPS. Last frame is a slip of paper "THE END." The whole video is accompanied by calm smooth music.

source.name: Google AI · Mastering Gemini Omni: The Ultimate Video Prompting Guide

prompts.title: 内心独白漂浮 3D 文字(Intrusive Thoughts)
prompts.prompt: Overlay motion-tracked, minimalist text commentary onto the physical environment of the video. This text represents [the subject] deadpan, immediate inner monologue that's observant, slightly absurd, and life-contemplating. Think "intrusive thoughts." Clean, white, lowercase sans-serif text (like Helvetica or Inter). The text hovers in 3D space, connected to the subjects being commented on via ultra-thin, crisp, white leader lines.

source.name: Google AI · Tip 2 Text Rendering (Intrusive Thoughts)

CHARACTER CYCLIST, intense focused expression, athletic posture. Bright sun urban highway and city streets, multi-lane traffic, overpasses, suspension bridge, red-marked tram tracks, clear blue sky.

RIDE 5 (0:06-0:08): Low-angle rear tracking. CHARACTER overtakes dark blue car, cuts in front through narrow gap, speed ramp, city streaking behind.

prompts.title: 古代水墨山水画动起来
prompts.prompt: A traditional Chinese ink-wash landscape painting comes alive on flat, laid-out Xuan paper with a subtle, fibrous texture. Initially, the painting appears still: several steep distant mountains stand faintly visible amidst clouds and mist, a small wooden boat rests on a wide, tranquil river. Then, soft diluted grey tones begin to billow around the mountains, creating layers of atmospheric mist that drift slowly. The boat slides gently downstream as ink ripples extend outward from its bow. A heron rendered in a few deft strokes lifts off from the reeds, its wings unfolding in fluid ink lines. Subtle motion throughout, minimalist composition. The mood is elegant, poetic, with cultural depth — the ink itself seems to breathe.

prompts.title: 工坊老工匠手部特写
prompts.prompt: A macro shot focuses on an elderly Chinese craftsman's weathered hands as they carve intricate patterns into a wooden block, rendered in a cinematic photography realistic style. The hands are positioned diagonally across the frame, deep grooves and age spots visible on the skin. Initially, the chisel is held with surgical steadiness above the wood. Then, with breathtaking precision and in extreme slow motion, the blade descends, and a curl of pale wood shavings peels away in a single continuous spiral. Next, dust motes begin to drift through a single beam of warm window light that crosses the workbench at a low angle. The camera holds steady on the hands and the emerging pattern, capturing each careful pass of the chisel, the fine grain of the wood, and the quiet dignity of the craft.

prompts.prompt: 一只圆滚滚的橘猫鬼鬼祟祟地跳上厨房料理台，伸出爪子去够一条放在盘子里的鱼，眼神警觉地左右张望，突然听到主人脚步声，立刻装出一副若无其事的样子坐下。室内自然光，可爱写实风格。

prompts.title: 即梦电商：奶茶产品镜头
prompts.prompt: 一杯透明杯装的桃子乌龙奶茶静静放在浅木桌上，桌面散落几朵新鲜桃花，背景是温暖的午后窗光透过纱帘，少女气息浓厚。镜头从俯视缓慢推进至侧面 45 度，杯壁水珠晶莹，奶茶层次清晰。商业广告级精致。

prompts.title: 即梦自然：黄山日出云海
prompts.prompt: 黄山之巅日出时分，一轮红日从云海中冉冉升起，金光洒在奇松怪石上，云海如波涛翻滚，远处山峦若隐若现。极广角航拍镜头，缓慢推进，国家地理纪录片质感，中式山水意境。

prompts.title: 即梦武侠：竹林剑客
prompts.prompt: 翠绿竹林中，一位白衣剑客手持长剑御风而立，剑尖凝结着细密水珠。突然一片竹叶飘落，剑客闪电般出剑将其精准切为两半。镜头从全景快速推进至剑尖特写，慢动作展现切割瞬间，武侠经典氛围。

prompts.title: 即梦生活：奶奶包饺子
prompts.prompt: 厨房窗边，一位慈祥的奶奶正在认真包饺子，皱纹爬上眼角，手指娴熟地捏出花边，旁边小孙女好奇地踮脚观看。温暖柔和的下午阳光透过窗户，木桌上散落着面粉和饺子。亲切纪录片风格，中景平稳镜头。

prompts.title: 即梦音乐 MV：城市夜景跳舞
prompts.prompt: 深圳市中心夜晚，霓虹闪烁的高楼天台上，一位青年街舞 dancer 在律动光影中展示流畅的 popping 动作，背景是无数闪烁的城市灯光和远处摩天大楼。低角度跟拍，霓虹紫粉蓝光影变化，运动模糊，潮流 MV 风格。

prompts.title: 即梦创意：水墨变 3D 山水
prompts.prompt: 一幅传统中国水墨山水画缓缓展开，画中的山峦、流水、孤舟逐渐脱离纸面，变成立体三维场景，最后镜头穿越进入画中世界，仿佛置身真实的山水之间。风格从水墨自然过渡到写实国风 CG，魔幻现实主义。

prompts.title: 香水广告（带角色配音 CTA）
prompts.prompt: Scene: Interior studio with smooth gradient lighting and a polished marble pedestal. Characters: A confident host (mid-30s, sleek black blazer) stands beside the bottle. Action: Close-up rotating perfume bottle, then the host introduces it enthusiastically, describing the scent notes with hand gestures. Extreme close-up of mist erupting in slow motion. Camera: Smooth orbit then push-in to extreme macro, ending on host's direct address. Audio & Style: Warm voiceover with subtle jazz bed, crisp atomizer hiss; luxury commercial polish.
prompts.notes: 示范 Kling 5 层公式：Scene → Characters → Action → Camera → Audio & Style

prompts.title: 香水广告（多镜头分镜 + 角色配音）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A sleek modern studio with soft gradient lighting and calm ambient music. Polished glass surface with subtle reflections. Characters: A lifestyle influencer in an elegant dress (early 30s, warm enthusiastic voice). Action: Shot 1 (0-4s) close-up on hands holding the perfume bottle, rotating it slowly to catch the light, glass gleaming. Shot 2 (4-8s) medium shot of the influencer, who says "I have to show you my new signature scent because it is literally a dream." Shot 3 (8-11s) extreme close-up of perfume mist spraying in slow motion, particles catching light. Shot 4 (11-15s) return to influencer smiling at camera: "Seriously, if you love vanilla and jasmine, you need this in your life. Link in my bio." Camera: Macro close-up to medium punch-in to extreme slow-mo, ending on direct address. Audio & Style: Soft atomizer spray SFX, elegant ambient music bed, luxury commercial polish.
Negative: cartoonish, smooth plastic skin, floating limbs, text morphing, watermark.
prompts.notes: Atlabs 官方原文示例。Kling 3.0 多镜头分镜 + 单角色定向发声的标杆样式

prompts.title: 无线耳机磁悬旋转（图生视频）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: Dark gradient background, cool white rim lighting, minimal floating stage. Characters: Matte black wireless headphones suspended at center. Action: A slow 180-degree orbit reveals cushion detail and brushed metal hinges; the headphones rotate gently as if weightless, subtle reflections shifting across the matte finish. Camera: Smooth horizontal orbit at constant speed, slight upward tilt at the midpoint, ending on a head-on hero frame. Audio & Style: Sub-bass swell synced to rotation, single bell tap on hero frame, premium product launch grade.
Negative: visible rig, motion blur smearing logo, text morphing, watermark.
prompts.notes: 改编自 kling3-ai.com Template 5。图生视频原则：只写运动方向 + 灯光细节，不重复描述产品已有外观

prompts.title: 蜂蜜淋松饼极致特写（图生视频）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: Soft top-down kitchen window light, warm honey tones, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh. Characters: A pair of pancakes stacked on a ceramic plate, a single hand holding a wooden honey dipper. Action: The dipper tilts; a thick golden ribbon of honey starts to fall, lands and pools across the top pancake, slowly cascading down the sides in viscous strands. Camera: Static extreme macro for the first beat, then a very slow push-in toward the pour point. Audio & Style: Thick liquid drip SFX, faint ambient kitchen tone, food-commercial texture and grain.
Negative: artificial gloss, plastic-looking honey, sliding plate, watermark.
prompts.notes: 改编自 kling3-ai.com Template 4。极致 macro + 液体物理：Kling 强项，避免 dramatic lighting 这种笼统词

prompts.title: 厨房晨间混乱（四角色定向发声）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A busy kitchen at morning light, toast crumbs on the counter, coffee machine steaming. Cereal pouring SFX, kids running footsteps, backpack zippers. Characters: Mom (mid-30s, stressed, fast urgent voice), Little Daughter (6, crying), Older Brother (early teens, sarcastic), Dad (40s, sleepy amused). Action: Shot 1 (0-3s) wide shot, mom flipping toast — Mom: "Shoes on! We're leaving in five minutes!" Shot 2 (3-5s) hallway, daughter searching frantically — Little Daughter: "I can't find my sweater!" Shot 3 (5-7s) doorway, brother arms crossed — Older Brother: "Because you never put it away." Shot 4 (7-9s) back to mom, heavy sigh — Mom (shouting): "Nobody is fighting before 8 AM!" Shot 5 (9-11s) dad walks in calmly with mug — Dad: "Good morning, team." Shot 6 (11-13s) mom turns sharply, exhausted — Mom: "Help." Camera: Tight handheld between rooms, single coverage per character, last beat held on mom. Audio & Style: Naturalistic kitchen ambience, no music, mumblecore family sitcom grade.
Negative: synthetic dubbed voices, lip-sync drift, watermark.
prompts.notes: Atlabs 原文 Multi-Character Kitchen Drama 示例。Kling 3.0 杀手锏：4 个角色 + 角色定向发声 + 多镜头分镜，业界几乎独占

prompts.title: 黄金时刻重逢（情感对话）
prompts.prompt: Scene: A park bench at golden hour, fall leaves drifting. Characters: Two reunited friends with a 10-year gap, both early 30s. Action: Alternating over-the-shoulder shots between both characters with nostalgic dialogue about missing each other, culminating in a moment of shared emotional recognition. Camera: Slow push-in on each speaker, ending on a held wide two-shot. Audio & Style: Soft piano underscore, ambient park sounds, warm cinematic color grade.

prompts.title: 雨夜车内对话
prompts.prompt: Scene: Interior of a parked car at night with rain drumming on the roof. Characters: Driver (40s, weathered face) and passenger (20s, anxious). Action: Driver expresses hesitation while passenger avoids eye contact, exploration of misunderstanding through tense back-and-forth dialogue with rain intensifying throughout. Camera: Tight two-shots alternating with isolating singles, slight handheld drift. Audio & Style: Heavy rain ambience, no music, naturalistic dialogue.

prompts.title: 教练训斥鼓手（高强度训练）
prompts.prompt: Scene: A dimly lit jazz rehearsal room with cymbals catching key light. Characters: A drumming instructor (60s, intense) and a young drummer (20s, sweating). Action: Instructor critiques drummer's tempo with escalating fury through multiple close-ups on sweating hands, facial expressions, and cymbal crashes. Character stammers nervously while instructor demands precision through shouted corrections. Camera: Punchy quick cuts, snap zooms to drummer's face. Audio & Style: Loud cymbal hits, raw vocal performance, no music.

prompts.title: 电梯邂逅（克制情感）
prompts.prompt: Scene: An elevator at night, soft fluorescent ambient. Characters: Two strangers (late 20s) who discover shared music taste during an elevator encounter. Action: Subtle smiles and whispered recognition develop connection through minimal dialogue before doors open, suggesting possibility. Camera: Static two-shot with rack focus between faces. Audio & Style: Faint elevator hum, almost imperceptible music leak from one stranger's headphones.

prompts.title: 棋手汗珠特写压力（图生视频）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: Tournament chess hall, shallow depth of field, blurred wooden board and pieces in the background. Characters: A grandmaster mid-game (Magnus-Carlsen style, intense focus). Action: A bead of sweat slowly forms at the temple and traces down the side of his face; his eyes stay locked forward on the board, pupils micro-adjusting; jaw tightens, breath held, then released through the nose. Camera: Very slow push-in over the full duration, focus pinned to the eye and the sweat drop traveling across skin. Audio & Style: Near-silent room tone, distant chess-clock tick, a single low cello drone, suffocating concentration grade.
Negative: cartoonish, smooth plastic skin, blinking out of rhythm, watermark.
prompts.notes: Atlabs 原文 Image-to-Video (Chess Example)。图生视频核心：只写动作（沿用图中已有的人物/环境）+ 显式 endpoint（汗珠到达脸颊）

prompts.title: 审讯室对峙（双角色定向发声）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A sleek modern interrogation room with cold LED lighting, muted gray walls, a one-way glass window, security cameras blinking red. Low atmospheric suspense bed humming with deep bass drones. Characters: Lead Detective (40s, navy suit, controlled serious voice) and Prime Suspect (late 20s, sharp defensive voice). Action: The detective leans forward, hands resting calmly — Detective: "Let's stop pretending." Suspect shifts in chair, tense — Suspect: "I already told you everything." Detective slides a folder across the table with paper-scrape SFX — Detective (calm threatening): "Then explain why your fingerprints are here." Suspect's breathing quickens — Suspect (trembling): "That's impossible…" Detective stands suddenly, chair scrapes back. Camera: Tight over-the-shoulder alternations, snap zoom on the folder, slow push-in on the suspect's eyes at the climax. Audio & Style: Rising pulse synth tightening into the final beat, room reverb on dialogue.
Negative: smiling, soap-opera lighting, floating limbs, watermark.
prompts.notes: fal.ai 官方 Kling 部署页原文示例 (Interrogation Room Scene)。双角色定向发声 + 物理音效（paper scrape / chair scrape）锚定真实感

prompts.title: 体育场冲场（队长鼓舞）
prompts.prompt: Scene: A stadium tunnel transitioning to a bright field. Characters: Players in team colors with the quarterback (captain) at the front. Action: Players depicted with backlit low angles gaining momentum, quarterback rallies team with commanding voice, then wide stadium shots with crowd and pyrotechnics. Camera: Tunnel POV → backlit low-angle hero shot → crane wide reveal. Audio & Style: Orchestral music building tension, crowd roar, captain's shouted voice line.

prompts.title: 都市跑酷夜行（FPV 无人机）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A narrow urban alley at night, magenta and cyan signage spilling onto wet asphalt, scaffolding overhead. Characters: A parkour runner in black sportswear, hood up. Action: The runner sprints into frame, vaults a row of dumpsters in one fluid motion, slides under low scaffolding without breaking stride, drags one gloved hand along a metal railing — sparks erupt and trail behind him. He launches off a stair edge and the camera barely keeps pace. Camera: Dynamic FPV drone shot, low and fast, chasing tightly behind the runner with quick yaw corrections through obstacles. Audio & Style: Breath rhythm in close mic, footfalls slapping wet ground, distant city hum, gritty handheld grade.
Negative: slow motion (unless cued), sliding feet, floating limbs, watermark.
prompts.notes: 改编自 kling3-ai.com Template 3。显式速度动词（sprints/vaults/slides）覆盖 Kling 默认慢动作倾向 — 09-kling-公式.md 第 6 节

prompts.title: 深夜厨房争吵（情感对白）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A dim kitchen late at night, only the refrigerator hum filling the silence, single overhead pendant casting a warm pool of light on a cluttered countertop. Characters: Exhausted Partner (30s, trembling frustrated voice) and Defensive Partner (30s, sharp defensive then regretful voice). Action: A plate is set down too hard with a sharp ceramic clink — Exhausted Partner: "You never listen to me." The other partner turns immediately, eyes wide — Defensive Partner (shouting): "Because you never stop blaming!" Exhausted Partner exhales shakily — Exhausted Partner (voice cracking): "I'm not blaming… I'm begging." Beat of silence. Defensive Partner sighs heavily, looks down — Defensive Partner (softly, regretful): "I don't know how to fix this." Camera: Tight singles alternating between the two, brief two-shot on the final regret, soft handheld drift. Audio & Style: Refrigerator hum bed, ceramic clink hit, a single sad piano chord entering on the last beat.
Negative: melodramatic underscoring, smiling, floating limbs, watermark.
prompts.notes: fal.ai 官方 Kling 部署页原文 (Kitchen Argument Scene)。展示 Kling 3.0 "音画原生同步 + 情绪外化" — 一个 piano chord 进入时机锁定情绪转折

prompts.title: 霓虹拉面店推镜（35mm 胶片质感）
prompts.prompt:
Scene: 一家狭长的霓虹拉面店，深夜，玻璃窗被蒸汽蒙上一层雾，外面街灯化作柔和的暖色 bokeh。 Characters: 一对年轻日本情侣并排坐在吧台前，碗里热气升腾。Action: 女子拿起筷子，慢慢卷起一缕面条，咬下时眼睛微微弯起；男子在旁边看着她，嘴角浮起一丝笑意；身后闪烁的洋红色霓虹招牌在雾窗上投下斑驳的反光。Camera: 缓慢的 dolly push-in，从店门口推进到吧台正前方，浅景深，焦点始终锁在女子的脸和那一缕面。Audio & Style: 碗筷轻碰声、安静的吸面声、远处城市嗡鸣，35mm 胶片暖颗粒，柔光高光晕染。
Negative: 卡通化、塑料皮肤光泽、滑步、文字变形、水印。
prompts.notes: 改编自 kling3-ai.com Ramen Shop 示例。展示 Kling 3.0 中文理解强项 — 全中文 5 层结构 + 胶片质感关键词。Kling 中文是业界并列第一

prompts.title: 未来都市俯冲(5 要素结构基准)
prompts.prompt:
Scene: A gleaming futuristic metropolis with towering glass skyscrapers and flying vehicles zooming between buildings. The city is bustling with activity as holographic advertisements illuminate the streets below. Neon lights reflect off wet pavement after a recent rainfall. Characters: Crowds of pedestrians moving in waves at the street level, distant figures in glass-walled offices. Action: The camera starts high above the city and gradually descends, moving through the layers of flying traffic to reveal the street level. Holographic ads shift across building faces. Camera: Slow vertical descent with parallax through traffic layers, ending in a wide street-level reveal. Audio & Style: Distant city hum, occasional flying-vehicle whoosh, rain remnants dripping; cinematic sci-fi color grade.
Negative: blurry, distorted geometry, jerky camera, unnatural lighting.
prompts.notes: 源自 EWBsU0fSgPs 5 要素结构示例 A1。重组为本仓库 5 层标签结构。

prompts.title: 山顶女性呼吸(图生视频)
prompts.prompt: Scene: Mountain peak vista with drifting clouds across an open sky; distant peaks fading into haze. Characters: A woman standing at the summit, hair and loose clothes catching the breeze, eyes closed in a long inhale. Action: The woman's hair and clothes gently move in the mountain breeze as she takes a deep breath of the fresh air. The clouds in the background drift slowly across the sky while distant birds soar between peaks. Camera: The camera gradually pulls back to reveal more of the majestic landscape surrounding her. Audio & Style: Crisp mountain wind, distant bird calls, soft ambient pad; awe-inspiring, golden-hour cinematic.

prompts.title: 咖啡杯静物追焦(图生视频)

Action: A coffee cup sits on a wooden window sill with soft light coming through the window. Outside, people walk by on the busy street, some rushing, others strolling. Camera: The camera slowly moves in a subtle arc around the cup, maintaining focus on the coffee cup while the background gradually blurs. Audio & Style: Muted urban hum, distant footsteps, subtle ambient cafe music; quiet still-life cinematic.
prompts.notes: 源 A3。Subtle arc 镜头示范 — Kling 擅长的小幅运动。

prompts.title: 商务演示(Elements 静态环境)
prompts.prompt: Scene: A modern office space with floor-to-ceiling windows, neutral palette, soft fill lighting. Characters: A confident businessman in his 40s wearing a dark blazer, presenting energetically to an unseen audience. Action: The businessman confidently presents to an unseen audience in the modern office space, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The office environment remains static while he moves naturally. Camera: The camera slowly zooms in on him as he delivers his presentation. Audio & Style: Subtle office ambience, clear voiced delivery, no music; clean corporate cinematic.

prompts.title: 海滩黄金猎犬奔跑(Elements)
prompts.prompt: Scene: A bright sandy shoreline with rolling waves and seagulls drifting overhead; golden sun across wet sand. Characters: A golden retriever in mid-stride, ears bouncing, fur catching light. Action: The golden retriever runs playfully along the shoreline, kicking up sand and water as its paws hit the wet beach. Its fur and ears bounce with each stride as it chases after an unseen object. Waves gently roll onto the shore in the background while seagulls fly overhead. Camera: The camera pans smoothly following the dog from the side as it runs from left to right across the frame. Audio & Style: Waves, paws on wet sand, distant gull calls, gentle wind; warm summer cinematic.

prompts.title: Spider-Man vs Iron Man 极简对决
prompts.prompt: Scene: A barren wasteland under harsh open sky, dust and debris carried by wind. Characters: Spider-Man and Iron Man squaring off in combat stances. Audio & Style: Impact thuds, repulsor blasts, web shots; epic orchestral cinematic.

prompts.title: 咖啡馆对话(原生音频)
prompts.prompt: Scene: A cozy cafe with warm pendant lights, ambient chatter, ceramic clinks. Characters: Two friends in their 30s seated across a small wooden table, both with coffee cups. Action: Two friends sitting in a cozy cafe. One asks, "Did you ever finish that novel?" The other replies, "Almost, I just can't seem to write the ending." Camera: Slow medium two-shot, soft punch-in on the speaker for each line. Audio & Style: Soft ambient cafe audio, warm lighting; understated indie-cinema tone.

prompts.title: 雨天咖啡馆女子独白
prompts.prompt: Scene: A cinematic rainy day cafe; rain splashes against the window with a cool blue-green tone; condensation on the glass; warm interior bulbs. Characters: A blonde woman, slightly damp from the rain, mid-30s, contemplative. Action: A cinematic rainy day cafe. Rain splashes against the window with a cool blue green tone. A blonde woman walks in slightly damp and sits down gazing directly at the camera and the woman says, "Some moments don't disappear. They just wait for you to return." Camera: Medium frontal shot, very slow push-in as she sits and meets the lens. Audio & Style: Rain on glass, distant cafe murmur, low piano bed; melancholic cinematic.

prompts.title: 屋顶追逐落日跑酷
prompts.prompt: Scene: A skyline at sunset, narrow city rooftops with antennas and ducts, scattering pigeons. Characters: A hooded thief mid-sprint, lean and agile. Action: A rooftop chase at sunset. prompts.title: 宇航员失重空间站

Audio & Style: Space station ambiance, distant hum, subtle systems beeps; serene sci-fi cinematic.

prompts.title: Motion Control 击鼓(空气鼓)

prompts.title: 东京霓虹雨夜独行男(摄像机聚焦)

Neon reflections glowing across the wet pavement. Camera: Cinematic handheld camera slowly tracking toward him. Audio & Style: Rain hiss, distant traffic, faint signage hum; cyberpunk neo-noir.

prompts.title: 拔枪眼神特写(Scene Context)
prompts.prompt: Scene: A dim interior with rim-lit silhouette and slight haze, mood between threat and inevitability. prompts.title: 好莱坞科幻多分镜 10s（Volcano Engine 官方 timecode 范式）
prompts.prompt:
Create a 10-second cinematic sequence in a Hollywood sci-fi style with cyberpunk aesthetics, high-contrast neon lighting, and an epic score feel.

Shot 1 (00:00-00:04) Wide tracking: a futuristic megacity canyon at night with falling rain. An anti-gravity vehicle weaves rapidly between skyscrapers. Countless holographic ads flash; neon reflections shimmer on glass curtain walls and the vehicle's surface. The vehicle leaves long blue light trails behind it.

Shot 2 (00:04-00:07) Cockpit tight action: the vehicle drifts sharply to avoid an obstacle. Sparks and mist as the fuselage grazes a building edge. Rain hits the camera lens, blown away by high-speed airflow. Subtle camera shake emphasizes speed.

Shot 3 (00:07-00:10) Epic pull-back crane: the vehicle bursts from the narrow buildings into an open city plaza. Reveal a panoramic megacity view as the vehicle flies through low clouds, with a massive lens flare streaking across the frame.

Technical: 1080p, teal-and-orange cinematic grading, HDR, complex particle effects, realistic motion blur. Constraints: no watermark, no text, no Logo, no warped buildings.

source.name: Volcano Engine - Seedance 2.0 prompt guide (timecode multi-shot template)

Wardrobe: Mid-30s traveler, navy coat, backpack, holding phone loosely.

Sound: Diegetic only—rail screech, train brakes, muffled announcement, ambient hum, footsteps, paper rustle.
prompts.notes: Sora 2 的「制作蓝皮书」级提示词模板：Format → Lenses → Grade → Lighting → Location → Wardrobe → Sound

prompts.title: 审讯室对白（OpenAI 官方 Dialogue 块）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Neo-noir crime drama, 35mm anamorphic, deep shadows, single-source key light, smoke-thick atmosphere, desaturated palette with bruised teal blacks.

A cramped, windowless room with walls the color of old ash. A single bare bulb dangles from the ceiling, its light pooling onto the scarred metal table at the center. Two chairs face each other across it. On one side sits the Detective, trench coat draped across the back of his chair, eyes sharp and unblinking. Across from him, the Suspect slouches, cigarette smoke curling lazily toward the ceiling. The silence presses in.

Cinematography:
- Camera: medium two-shot, locked off; subtle push-in on the Detective for the final line
- Lens: 40mm anamorphic; shallow focus drifting between faces
- Lighting: hard top-down practical, no fill; smoke catches the beam
- Mood: claustrophobic, accusatory

Dialogue:
- Detective: "You're lying. I can hear it in your silence."
- Suspect: "Or maybe I'm just tired of talking."
- Detective: "Either way, you'll talk before the night's over."

Background Sound: Faint hum of the overhead light; chair creak; one slow exhale of smoke.
prompts.notes: Cookbook 示范如何把 Dialogue 单独成块、用 alternating turns 让模型把每行对应到正确角色

prompts.title: 90 年代纪录片访谈（短提示词版）
prompts.prompt:
Style: 90s documentary interview, 16mm with soft halation, slight gate weave, warm Kodachrome grade, fine grain.

In a wood-paneled study lined with old books and a single lamp, an old Swedish man—weathered hands, wool cardigan, kind eyes—sits in a worn leather armchair. Afternoon light slants through linen curtains. He looks slightly off-camera as if speaking to an unseen interviewer.

Cinematography:
- Camera: medium close-up, eye level, locked off on a small tripod
- Lens: 50mm vintage prime; gentle shallow focus on his face
- Lighting: single window key from camera left; warm practical fill from desk lamp
- Mood: reflective, intimate, unhurried

Actions:
- He folds his hands slowly in his lap
- Old Swedish man (softly): "I still remember when I was young."
- A small smile, eyes drifting toward the window

Background Sound: Faint clock ticking; distant traffic hum; one page settling on the desk. No music.
prompts.notes: Cookbook 原版只有一句话；这里按官方说法把它扩成 Shot-List 仍保留留白让模型发挥

prompts.title: 霓虹湿街强写法对比（Cookbook Strong Prompt）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Contemporary urban cinematic, anamorphic 2.0x, shallow DOF, volumetric light through humid air, neon-saturated palette of magenta, cyan, and amber.

A narrow city street after rain. Wet asphalt with painted zebra crosswalk reflecting overhead signs. Neon storefront signs—red, pink, cyan—shimmer in shallow puddles. Steam drifts from a manhole. The sidewalk is empty except for a lone figure waiting at the curb.

Cinematography:
- Camera: low-angle wide, eye level with the pavement, slow push-in along the crosswalk lines
- Lens: 35mm anamorphic; horizontal lens flares from neon
- Lighting: neon signs as colored key; underlit by reflections in wet asphalt
- Mood: cinematic, expectant, lonely

Actions:
- A taxi rolls past slowly; reflections fracture in the puddle
- The figure steps once toward the curb and stops
- A traffic light cycles from red to green; the puddle ripples

Background Sound: Distant traffic hiss; tire spray on wet road; faint hum from a flickering sign. No score.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Weak vs Strong prompts

prompts.notes: Cookbook 用「wet asphalt, zebra crosswalk, neon sign reflection」+「anamorphic 2.0x, shallow DOF, volumetric light」作为 strong prompt 样板；本条把它扩成完整 Shot-List

prompts.title: 骑行者刹停十字路口（Beats > Seconds）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Naturalistic documentary, handheld ENG camera, slight rolling shutter wobble, warm afternoon grade with cool shadows.

A quiet residential intersection. Late-afternoon sun rakes across the asphalt. Trees throw long, dappled shadows on the crosswalk. A young cyclist in a faded windbreaker approaches from frame left, breath visible in the cool air.

Cinematography:
- Camera: handheld eye-level, tracks the cyclist briefly from the side, then settles
- Lens: 28mm; deep focus keeping street and rider sharp
- Lighting: golden hour sun from camera right; cool blue fill from sky
- Mood: grounded, observational, gently kinetic

Actions:
- Cyclist pedals three times, coasting toward the crosswalk
- Brakes squeeze; the bike slows, rear wheel barely chirps on asphalt
- Foot drops; cyclist stops fully at the crosswalk, glances right
- A small exhale, then steady stillness for the final beat

Background Sound: Bike-chain tick; brake-pad squeak; distant lawnmower; one bird. No music.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Control motion and timing

prompts.notes: Cookbook 原句：「Cyclist pedals three times, brakes, and stops at crosswalk」—— 用可数 beats 替代「moves quickly」

prompts.title: 四步到窗前拉开窗帘（精确动作分解）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Quiet drama, naturalistic, soft window-light cinematography, muted earth-tone palette of amber, cream, walnut brown.

A narrow apartment bedroom at late morning. A wooden floor, an unmade bed in soft shadow, sheer curtains drawn shut over a tall window. Pale light bleeds through the fabric. An actor in a simple linen shirt stands a few paces from the window, hesitating.

Cinematography:
- Camera: medium-wide, locked off at eye level; one slow micro-push toward the window
- Lens: 50mm; shallow DOF, sharp on the actor
- Lighting: soft window light as key; warm lamp fill on the bed; cool rim from hallway
- Mood: contemplative, tender, quietly hopeful

Actions:
- Actor takes four steps to the window
- Pauses, hand hovering near the curtain
- Inhales once
- Pulls the curtain open in the final second; daylight floods the room

Background Sound: Floorboard creak under each step; fabric slide of the curtain; distant city hum beyond the glass. No music.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Beats and lighting examples

prompts.notes: 组合 Cookbook 两条原文：1) 「Actor takes four steps to the window, pauses, and pulls the curtain in the final second」；2) 「soft window light with warm lamp fill, cool rim from hallway / palette anchors: amber, cream, walnut brown」

prompts.title: 她转身微笑然后离开画面（图像输入参考）

[Use image input as first-frame reference: a young woman standing in soft afternoon light, three-quarter angle, environment locked in by the image.]

Cinematography:

- Lens: 50mm; shallow DOF preserving the reference's separation between subject and background
- Lighting: maintain the reference's soft directional key and ambient fill

Actions:

prompts.title: 金毛 Alfie 日出狂奔（Characters API 一致性）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Cinematic outdoor naturalism, slow-motion-ready, golden-hour grade with cool morning shadows, fine grain.

A wide meadow at sunrise, wet grass beaded with dew, low fog drifting between the blades. The horizon line catches first light, painting the sky pale gold and salmon. Alfie, a buoyant golden retriever, charges across frame from camera right toward camera left.

Cinematography:
- Camera: low-angle tracking shot at knee height, dollying with Alfie
- Lens: 35mm; deep focus to keep meadow and dog sharp
- Lighting: warm rim from rising sun camera left; cool fill from open sky
- Mood: joyful, free, kinetic

Actions:
- Alfie bounds three strides, ears flapping, tongue out
- Splashes through a shallow puddle; droplets arc in slow motion
- A burst of fog parts around his shoulders
- He veers slightly toward camera, eyes bright, then continues past

Background Sound: Paws on wet grass; water spray; soft dawn birdsong. No score.

API: model: sora-2, size 720x1280, seconds 4, characters [{ id: char_alfie }] — name Alfie in the prompt so the model binds the reference identity.
prompts.notes: Cookbook 原 JSON 样例 prompt：「A cinematic shot of Alfie running through wet grass at sunrise」—— 这里展开成完整 Shot-List，保留 Characters API 用法

prompts.title: IMAX 航拍冰川史诗（Style 锚定法）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Epic, IMAX-scale aerial cinematography, 70mm large-format texture, ultra-clear deep blacks, restrained color grade favoring glacial blues and pale gold sunlight.

A vast tidewater glacier meets a still arctic fjord at dawn. Cracked ice fields stretch toward distant snow-capped peaks. A faint mist rises off open water; a lone iceberg drifts mid-frame. No people, no boats.

Cinematography:
- Camera: aerial wide shot, slight downward angle, slow forward push toward the glacier face
- Lens: 24mm spherical; deep focus from foreground floes to distant peaks
- Lighting: low-angle sunrise key from camera right; cool ambient fill from open sky
- Mood: monumental, hushed, geological

Actions:
- Camera glides forward at steady altitude; an ice shelf calves silently in the distance
- The chunk slips into the sea, sending a slow, wide ripple toward camera
- The iceberg rolls a quarter turn, revealing translucent blue underbelly

Background Sound: Distant low ice groan; wind across open water; one sharp crack at calving. No music.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Visual cues that steer the look

prompts.notes: Cookbook 把「epic, IMAX-scale scene」「aerial wide shot, slight downward angle」列为 style anchor 与 framing 示例 —— 此条把两者合并成完整提示词

prompts.title: 16mm 黑白手持街头纪录片
prompts.prompt:
Style: Vintage 16mm black-and-white documentary, high-contrast silver-gelatin grade, visible grain, slight gate weave, mild lens vignette.

A narrow market street in a working-class neighborhood, mid-morning, late autumn. Vendors set up wooden stalls; steam rises from a kettle. Pedestrians cross frame in soft motion blur. A young vendor in a wool cap arranges apples into a pyramid.

Cinematography:
- Camera: handheld ENG camera at chest height; gentle drift between subjects, no zooms
- Lens: 25mm prime; deep focus from foreground crates to background storefront
- Lighting: overcast natural sky as soft key; no fill; deep blacks in stall shadows
- Mood: observational, warm despite monochrome, lived-in

Actions:
- Vendor lifts an apple, polishes it on his apron, places it atop the pyramid
- A child runs past chasing a paper bag
- Vendor glances up at the camera, half-smiles, returns to stacking

Background Sound: Crate scrape; coins clinking; nearby radio playing a faint folk tune; footsteps on cobble. No score.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Visual cues that steer the look

prompts.notes: Cookbook 提到「vintage 16mm documentary」与「handheld eng camera」作为风格锚点；本条按官方 anatomy（style → scene → cinematography → actions → sound）完整组装

prompts.title: 暖窗光与冷走廊光的厨房早晨（Lighting Recipe）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Quiet domestic realism, naturalistic color science, gentle film emulation, palette anchors: amber, cream, walnut brown.

A small kitchen at 8:00 AM. Tall window over the sink, sheer curtain half-open. A walnut breakfast table holds a single ceramic mug, a folded newspaper, and a bowl of cream-colored linen napkins. Hallway behind the table opens to a cooler, bluer adjoining room.

Cinematography:
- Camera: medium-wide, locked off; one almost-imperceptible micro-push toward the mug
- Lens: 40mm; shallow DOF favoring the mug and newspaper
- Lighting: soft window light as key from camera left; warm lamp fill on the table; cool rim from the hallway
- Mood: calm, lived-in, hopeful

Actions:
- Steam rises in a slow ribbon from the mug
- A draft lifts the curtain edge a few inches and lets it drop
- A hand enters frame, picks up the mug, lifts it out of frame; the saucer remains

Background Sound: Refrigerator hum; clock ticking; faint kettle settling in the next room. No music.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Lighting and color consistency

prompts.title: 咖啡馆早午餐对话（Audio 与 Dialogue 节奏）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Contemporary indie drama, naturalistic, 35mm Super 35 emulation, warm afternoon light with subtle haze, gently desaturated palette.

A neighborhood café mid-afternoon. A two-top by the window; light through bistro curtains scatters across a marble tabletop. Two friends in their late 20s sit across from one another over half-finished lattes. One leans on her elbow; the other turns a spoon idly.

Cinematography:
- Camera: shoulder-level shot/reverse-shot is implied but stay on a single over-the-shoulder framing on Speaker A; very small handheld breathing
- Lens: 50mm; shallow DOF, sharp on faces
- Lighting: warm window backlight as key; gentle bounce on the inside cheek; cool ambient fill from the café interior
- Mood: candid, intimate, slightly nervous

Actions:
- Speaker A (quietly): "I almost didn't come today."
- Speaker B (gentle): "I know."
- Speaker A glances down at her cup, traces the rim with one finger
- Speaker B (softly): "I'm glad you did."

Background Sound: The hum of espresso machines and the murmur of voices form the background; cup tap on saucer; one chair scrape across the room. No score.
prompts.notes: Cookbook 示范的环境声原句：「The hum of espresso machines and the murmur of voices form the background.」+ 官方建议 4s 容 1-2 句对白、8s 容更多

prompts.title: 迭代式镜头切换 85mm（Edit Prompt 工作流）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Continuation of a previous Sora 2 generation. Maintain the locked aesthetic — same wardrobe, same set dressing, same color grade. Only change what is specified below.

Reference: same subject, same location, same lighting setup as the original clip.

Cinematography (changes only):
- Same shot, switch to 85mm
- Shallower depth of field; tighter framing on the subject's eyes and hands
- Keep camera height and angle identical to the original

Actions (unchanged):
- Subject performs the original action exactly as before; do not re-block, do not re-light

Background Sound: Identical to the original — diegetic only, no added score.

Production note: this is an EDIT prompt, not a fresh generation. Pin the original as reference and describe only the change ("same shot, switch to 85mm"). Sora 2 Edit endpoint: POST /v1/videos/{video_id}/edits.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Iterate with video edits

prompts.notes: Cookbook 原文：「same shot, switch to 85 mm」「Editing is for nudging, not gambling」—— 这条把 Edit Workflow 直接转成可复用模板

prompts.title: 无人长走廊缓推（Style + 最小动作）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Slow-burn psychological horror, 1.85:1 framing, 35mm anamorphic, desaturated palette of bone, pale green, and shadow black, fine grain, restrained halation.

A long, empty hospital corridor at night. Linoleum floor reflects a single flickering fluorescent tube halfway down. Closed doors line both walls; numbers stenciled in faded paint. The far end of the corridor disappears into darkness.

Cinematography:
- Camera: locked off centered on the vanishing point, very slow dolly-in along the corridor axis
- Lens: 32mm anamorphic; deep focus the whole length
- Lighting: single overhead fluorescent as key; cool ceiling spill; deep blacks at the far end
- Mood: dread, restraint, anticipation

Actions:
- The fluorescent tube buzzes once and dims for half a beat
- A door at the far end clicks softly but does not move
- The camera holds for the final beat; nothing more happens

Background Sound: Fluorescent ballast hum; distant ventilation whine; one quiet click from the door. No score, no jump scare.

source.name: OpenAI Cookbook — Style is the strongest lever

prompts.notes: 对照 Cookbook 反复强调的「Establish style early」+「Each shot should have one clear camera move and one clear subject action」—— 用克制的两个 beat 替代「scary jump scare」式描述

prompts.title: 多镜头连续性两段（Multi-shot 拼接）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Naturalistic indie drama, 35mm spherical, soft afternoon grade, palette anchors: oat, slate blue, soft rust. Keep style identical across both shots so they cut cleanly.

Shot 1 (0.0–4.0s) — Apartment doorway:
- Camera: medium-wide, locked off at eye level
- Lens: 35mm; shallow DOF on the subject
- Lighting: warm hallway key from camera right, cool spill from open apartment
- Action: A woman in a soft rust sweater pauses in the doorway, sets a paper grocery bag on the floor, looks back over her shoulder once

Shot 2 (4.0–8.0s) — Kitchen counter:
- Camera: medium close-up, locked off
- Lens: 50mm; same shallow DOF; same wardrobe and lighting logic
- Lighting: window light from camera left, warm pendant fill above the counter
- Action: Same woman unpacks one apple from the bag, places it on a wooden board, exhales once

Background Sound: Door click between shots; bag rustle; apple set down softly. No score, no transition sweetener.

Note: each shot has one camera setup, one action, one lighting recipe — per Cookbook's multi-shot guidance. Stitch the two clips in edit or let them play as a sequence.
prompts.notes: Cookbook 原句：「Describing multiple shots in a single prompt is also valid... keep each shot block distinct: one camera setup, one subject action, and one lighting recipe at a time.」

prompts.title: 东京霓虹巷雨夜步行（Atlabs 7 层结构）
prompts.prompt:
Style: Contemporary cinematic, anamorphic 2.0x, shallow DOF, volumetric light through wet air, neon-saturated palette of magenta, cyan, amber.

Scene Setup: A bustling neon-lit Tokyo alley at midnight during a light rain, with reflective puddles on the pavement.

Subject and Action: A young woman in a leather jacket walks confidently, glancing over her shoulder with determination.

- Continues forward; a passing umbrella crosses the foreground

Physics & Materials: Rain droplets ripple in puddles; wind gently rustles the jacket's fabric; realistic shadows from overhead lights.
